test_cases.name: create_author_success
test_cases.description: Successfully create a new author with valid data

test_cases.name: create_author_invalid_name
test_cases.description: Fail to create author with empty name

test_cases.name: get_author_not_found
test_cases.description: Return 404 for non-existent author ID

test_cases.name: get_author_not_modified
test_cases.description: Return 304 when ETag matches If-None-Match

test_cases.name: create_book_success
test_cases.description: Successfully create a book with valid fields

test_cases.name: create_book_duplicate_isbn
test_cases.description: Fail to create book with existing ISBN

test_cases.name: get_book_deleted
test_cases.description: Return 410 for soft-deleted book

test_cases.name: delete_book_success
test_cases.description: Perform soft delete on an existing book

test_cases.name: delete_book_already_deleted
test_cases.description: Return 410 when deleting already deleted book

test_cases.name: restore_book_success
test_cases.description: Restore a soft-deleted book

test_cases.name: restore_book_not_deleted
test_cases.description: Fail to restore a book that is not deleted

test_cases.name: apply_discount_success
test_cases.description: Apply valid discount to old book

test_cases.name: apply_discount_too_new
test_cases.description: Fail to apply discount to book published this year

test_cases.name: apply_discount_rate_limit
test_cases.description: Exceed rate limit for discount endpoint

test_cases.name: update_stock_success
test_cases.description: Successfully update stock via query param

test_cases.name: update_stock_insufficient
test_cases.description: Fail to reduce stock below zero

test_cases.name: upload_cover_unsupported_type
test_cases.description: Fail to upload non-image file

test_cases.name: upload_cover_too_large
test_cases.description: Fail to upload file exceeding 2MB

test_cases.name: create_order_success
test_cases.description: Successfully create order and reduce stock

test_cases.name: create_order_duplicate_items
test_cases.description: Fail to create order with duplicate book IDs

test_cases.name: update_status_invalid_transition
test_cases.description: Fail to transition from pending to delivered directly

test_cases.name: get_invoice_forbidden
test_cases.description: Fail to get invoice for pending order

test_cases.name: bulk_create_unauthorized
test_cases.description: Fail to bulk create without API key

test_cases.name: bulk_create_partial_success
test_cases.description: Return 207 when some books fail validation

test_cases.name: start_export_success
test_cases.description: Start async book export

test_cases.name: poll_export_processing
test_cases.description: Return 202 while export is processing

test_cases.name: get_export_not_found
test_cases.description: Return 404 for invalid job ID

test_cases.name: toggle_maintenance_success
test_cases.description: Enable maintenance mode

test_cases.name: get_stats_unauthorized
test_cases.description: Fail to get statistics without API key
